interpretation: The 96 nm/px assumption is supported only by slide/project-text evidence and by FoV divided by raw movie dimensions being approximately compatible with that scale. No raw HDF5 attribute or microscope metadata statement was found, so calibrated diffusion constants remain blocked; use apparent optical-front units.
